title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Body Odor
description: Thymus vulgaris tinctures contains thymol, carvacrol, and pinene as its bioactive constituents. Thymol is a potent antimicrobial agent that helps to eliminate bacteria that cause body odor. Carvacrol also has antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce the growth of odor-causing bacteria on the skin.
